recommendation_rules.attendance_lt_65: Critical attendance: arrange immediate follow-up with guardian and class teacher.
recommendation_rules.attendance_lt_75: Low attendance: encourage consistent attendance and monitor weekly.
recommendation_rules.predicted_score_lt_55: Provide urgent academic intervention, remedial sessions, and progress tracking.
recommendation_rules.predicted_score_lt_75: Provide targeted support in weak areas and schedule additional practice.
recommendation_rules.performance_unstable: Performance is unstable across terms; review subject-level gaps and study plan.
recommendation_rules.declining_trend: Declining trend detected; plan early intervention before final assessment.
